title: MiuMauPiuPau
description: Experience ᓚ₍^. .^₎s in your Minecraft chat! Meow!
body:
# MiuMauPiuPau
Bring your inner cat alive and send many meows (miumaus) to the chat with this mod!
Meows or miumaus are random strings taken from the mods config. By default they are either cat sounds, cat emoticons or some other animal sounds! I recommend checking the config, many aspects of this mod are configurable :)
## Usage
Start your message with prefix (defaults to "!") to insert meows into your chat message at random positions. Also works with commands, just add the command you want to use to the Command Whitelist section in config.

You can also use the `Send random 🐈 to chat` keybinding to, well send random meow to chat :3

Tip: If you only send the prefix, it will be replaced with one random meow always!

## Config
Config is located at `.minecraft/config/miumaupiupau.json`. You can install [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) alongside for in-game config screen or just edit the config file manually! It is recommended to install YACL.
